article.title: FCC exempts Netgear from ban on foreign routers, doesn't explain why
article.summary: Netgear is the first major vendor of consumer routers to obtain an exemption from the US government's sweeping ban on foreign-made routers. The Federal Communications Commission yesterday announced an exemption for Netgear's Nighthawk and Orbi routers, and its cable gateways and modems. It came about three weeks after the FCC said it would no longer approve consumer-grade routers made at least partly outside the US, except in cases where the Department of Defense or Department of Homeland Security determines that the router does not pose national security risks. Under the new router ban, the Trump administration decides—through an opaque process in which it's unclear why any particular company receives an exemption—which companies' devices can be sold to consumers. Netgear, which is based
article.title_zh: FCC 豁免 Netgear 外國路由器禁令，未給出解釋
article.summary_zh: Netgear 是首家獲得美國政府外國製造路由器禁令豁免的主要消費級路由器廠商，FCC 宣佈對 Netgear Nighthawk、Orbi 路由器及其纜線閘道和數據機進行豁免。

article.title: Bessent Calls Anthropic’s Mythos a Breakthrough in China AI Race
article.summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent hailed Anthropic PBC’s Mythos as a revolutionary step that will keep America ahead of China in AI, endorsing an industry leader that’s clashed with Washington over its role in military endeavors.
article.title_zh: Bessent 稱 Anthropic 的 Mythos 是中美 AI 競賽中的突破性進展
article.summary_zh: 美國財政部長 Scott Bessent 稱讚 Anthropic PBC 的 Mythos 是革命性的一步，將保持美國在 AI 領域領先中國的地位，力挺這家曾因軍事用途問題與華盛頓發生衝突的業界領袖。

article.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
article.summary: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.
article.title_zh: OpenAI 更新 Agents SDK 幫助企業構建更安全、更強大的代理
article.summary_zh: 隨著代理 AI 持續增長，OpenAI 擴展了其代理構建工具包的功能。

article.title: Claude Code 新增 Routine 功能，重新設計桌面版提升開發效率
article.summary: Anthropic 為 Claude 加入新功能，讓自動化執行以 Claude 為核心的開發任務變得更容易。 […]

article.title: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
article.title_zh: 深入 VAKRA：Agent 的推理、工具使用與失敗模式

article.title: New report claims App Store search suggestions and ads steered users to ‘nudify’ apps
article.summary: The Tech Transparency Project (TTP) has followed up on its January report that revealed dozens of “nudify” apps on the App Store with a new investigation focused on how Apple’s own search and ad systems may be helping users find them. Here are the details. more…
article.title_zh: 新報告聲稱 App Store 搜尋建議和廣告引導使用者找到「脫衣」應用程式
article.summary_zh: Tech Transparency Project (TTP) 發布新調查報告，揭示 Apple 的搜尋和廣告系統如何幫助使用者找到 App Store 上的「脫衣」應用程式。

article.title: Nvidia’s Huang Says Mythos Shows Need for US-China AI Dialogue
article.summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said that Anthropic PBC’s Mythos breakthrough shows that the US should seek greater cooperation with China so artificial intelligence researchers in the world’s two largest economies can agree on how to safely use the increasingly powerful technology.
article.title_zh: Nvidia的Huang表示Mythos表明需要美中AI對話
article.summary_zh: Nvidia Corp執行長Jensen Huang表示，Anthropic PBC的Mythos突破表明美國應尋求與中國進一步合作，以便全球兩大經濟體的AI研究人員能就安全使用日益強大的技術達成共識。

article.title: AMD's market cap hits all-time high, Intel hits 25-year high on Agentic AI's insatiable demand for CPUs
article.summary: Demand for CPUs by AI systems is creating positive sentiment and drives AMD and Intel stocks to their highs.
article.title_zh: AMD's market cap hits all-time high, Intel hits 25-year high on Agentic AI's insatiable demand for CPUs
article.summary_zh: Demand for CPUs by AI systems is creating positive sentiment and drives AMD and Intel stocks to their highs.

article.title: Your Galaxy phone could lose a key Samsung Wallet feature if you don’t update Play Services
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Samsung Wallet users must update Google Play Services to use a vital feature. Samsung is notifying users that the digital key feature may stop working on outdated versions of Play Services. If you use the feature, a few simple steps can update Play Services on your Galaxy device. Samsung Wallet is an excellent Google Wallet alternative that stores your digital payment cards, IDs and vital documents, and even serves as a password manager. Additionally, it can also unlock your cars and smart doors. But to do that smoothly, you must keep a key Android app up to date. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: 如果不更新 Play Services，你的 Galaxy 手機可能會失去 Samsung Wallet 的關鍵功能
article.summary_zh: Samsung Wallet 使用者必須更新 Google Play Services 才能使用數位鑰匙功能，Samsung 正在通知使用者該功能在舊版 Play Services 上可能停止運作。

article.title: Nothing just pulled its brand-new file transfer app without an explanation
article.summary: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority TL;DR Nothing just removed its brand new “Nothing Warp” file transfer app and Chrome extension without any official explanation. The app and its browser extension were released yesterday, but are now unavailable for those who didn’t download them at launch. Nothing has weirdly taken down its newly launched Warp app from the Play Store , along with its Chrome extension and official announcement blog post, just hours after making it public.
article.title_zh: Nothing 神秘下架全新文件傳輸應用
article.summary_zh: Nothing 突然移除了昨天才發布的「Nothing Warp」文件傳輸應用和 Chrome 擴充程式，並未提供任何官方說明，未及時下載的用戶已無法取得。

article.title: A year in, Google wants its Axion processors to feel like a scheduling decision
article.summary: At KubeCon Europe in Amsterdam, The New Stack sat down with Jago Macleod and Abdel Sghiouar from Google Cloud to talk about what a year of its Arm-based Axion processors in production has meant for Kubernetes users. To sum it up: their argument is that today, the question of whether to try Arm for a given workload has become something that’s easy to answer, because for the majority of containerized workloads, everything is now in place to move them to Arm. “It’s essentially going to boil down to tokens per watt. And I think we will end up selling watts, not CPUs.” — Macleod In this episode, we’ll look at where Google’s custom Arm CPU fits on GKE, why compute classes matter more than the chip itself, and why the real ceiling on all of this is energy
article.title_zh: 推出一年後，Google 希望 Axion 處理器成為排程決策
article.summary_zh: Google Cloud 在 KubeCon Europe 分享 Arm 架構 Axion 處理器在生產環境中運行一年的成果，強調對 Kubernetes 用戶的實際意義。

article.title: Alibaba Moves Onto Tencent’s Turf With New AI Model for 3D Video
article.summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. launched a new AI model that can be used to develop games and generate videos simulating the real world, expanding its suite of products to challenge Tencent Holdings Ltd. as it looks to monetize the technology.
article.title_zh: Alibaba 推出新 AI 模型進軍 Tencent 領地打造 3D 影片
article.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴集團推出新 AI 模型，可用於開發遊戲和生成模擬真實世界的影片，擴展其產品組合以挑戰騰訊控股。
